understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all levels by matching your piece's shape, color, and rotation to the requirements of goal cells scattered across the grid, then stepping onto them to activate them. You must manage stamina to avoid losing lives, and navigate around walls.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game is grid-based. Each turn you can move one cell in a cardinal direction, costing 1 stamina. Running out of stamina loses a life and resets stamina to 42. Modifier tiles change your piece's attributes: shape and color modifiers cycle through options, rotation modifier rotates 90° clockwise. Goal cells have specific shape, color, and rotation requirements; your piece must exactly match all three when you step on the goal to complete it. Walls block movement. The player receives feedback on current piece attributes and locations of goal cells and modifier tiles.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all levels by matching your piece's shape, color, and rotation to the requirements of goal cells scattered across the grid, then stepping onto them to activate them. You must manage stamina to avoid losing lives, and navigate around walls.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game is grid-based. Each turn you can move one cell in a cardinal direction, costing 1 stamina. Running out of stamina loses a life and resets stamina to 42. Modifier tiles change your piece's attributes: shape and color modifiers cycle through options, rotation modifier rotates 90° clockwise. Goal cells have specific shape, color, and rotation requirements; your piece must exactly match all three when you step on the goal to complete it. Walls block movement. The player receives feedback on current piece attributes and locations of goal cells and modifier tiles.
